landing.heroDesc: A read-only stack on public Data API (optional subgraph + Gamma): deep reports, strategy inference, official leaderboards, and optional self-hosted rankings. Open-source backend: Polymarket-Analyzer on GitHub.
landing.f1: Per-wallet: open/closed rollup, distribution, price buckets, strategy — drill into per-market activity.
landing.f2: Optional Postgres: report cache, raw ingestion, reconciliation & canonical persistence; REST `GET /analyze/:wallet`.
landing.f3: Analyzer sidebar: Polymarket public leaderboard (saved / periods + category) next to your watchlist.
landing.f4: No trading, signing, or private keys—research and risk-style insights only.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.errorHintOfficial: Check network or retry later (defaults to browser → official API; set NEXT_PUBLIC_POLYMARKET_LEADERBOARD_SERVER_PROXY=1 if CORS blocks).
leaderboard.errorHintAnalyzer: Ensure DATABASE_URL is set on your API and proxy/CORS is configured.
leaderboard.empty: No rows yet — run analyze for wallets to populate the cache.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.empty: No saved wallets. Star a wallet on its account page to add or remove it from this list.

docs.title: Docs
docs.intro: This UI talks to your self-hosted Polymarket Account Analyzer API. See the repo README for deploy and env vars.
docs.api: HTTP endpoints (analyze / leaderboard) are documented in OpenAPI and the backend README.
docs.envApi: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL — API root; on Vercel you can use /api/backend same-origin proxy.
docs.envBackend: ANALYZER_BACKEND_URL — server-only; forwards to your VPS HTTP API.

analyzer.emptyHint: Enter a full wallet address below (0x + 40 hex characters) and press Enter, or click a row in the leaderboard on the left.

account.dataNotesFallback: Lifetime net PnL = sell-realized (avg cost) + settlement on resolved markets for shares still held (net_pnl_settlement; see KPI footnote). Same max win/loss basis. Total volume is notional sum. Trade count may differ from Polymarket user-stats. See backend README.
account.samplingBanner: Data sampling active — partial trades only // DATA_SAMPLING_ACTIVE
account.officialPnlEmpty: No series data for this range.
account.officialApisSubtitle: Independent of the self-hosted analyze report: Gamma profile via same-origin /api proxy (CORS-safe); positions from Data API in-browser. Tables merge paginated pages.
account.officialApisPaginationHint: (sample page limit=50, offset=0; table is full merge)
account.officialApisRelativeNote: The /api/polymarket-public-profile path is same-origin; the Next server then calls https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/public-profile. Missing data is not caused by a “relative URL without https” in the browser.
account.officialApisCorsHint: Gamma public-profile defaults to same-origin /api proxy (no browser CORS). Data API is usually direct; if blocked, set NEXT_PUBLIC_POLYMARKET_DATA_API_ORIGIN. For debugging, NEXT_PUBLIC_POLYMARKET_GAMMA_BROWSER_DIRECT=1 forces direct Gamma (often fails).
account.officialApisEmptyProfile404: Gamma returned HTTP 404 for this address: no public profile (independent of whether /positions has rows).
account.officialApisEmptyProfileBadJson: HTTP {status}, but the JSON body is empty or not an object. Inspect /api/polymarket-public-profile in Network → Response.
account.officialApisEmptyProfileFootnote: After /positions loads, we retry Gamma using proxyWallet from rows when it differs from the searched address.
account.officialApisProfileMatchedProxy: Profile matched proxy address {addr} (normal if it differs from the searched wallet).
account.marketActivitySubtitle: Markets are taken from open + closed positions in this report. Fetches Data API /activity for the selected market (server may use PG cache).
account.firstAnalyzeBody: Analyze does not paginate /trades anymore. A cold run still: pages /positions + /closed-positions (sleeping rate_limit_ms between pages); then hits Gamma once per distinct position slug (capped by [ingestion].max_gamma_slugs_for_timing, each followed by the same sleep). First process start with gamma_taxonomy may also download the full Gamma /tags catalog. persist_raw writes many PG rows. Large wallets = many sequential HTTP round-trips, so total time can still be minutes.
account.firstAnalyzeHint: To speed up: lower max_gamma_slugs_for_timing or set 0, disable gamma_taxonomy, disable persist_raw, or reduce rate_limit_ms (watch API limits). Cached hits are usually fast.
account.ledgerPairedSource: Exit-side rows with realized P&L only (avg-cost): each sell + each settlement; buys are folded into buy price/total. Open risk in Current positions; full fill-level ledger below.
account.ledgerPairedEmpty: No sell or settlement rows yet (e.g. buys only). See the full trade ledger below.
account.ledgerPairedFootnote: Avg-cost exit view, not strict FIFO lot pairing. See repo artifacts/trade-ledger-pairing-suggestions.md for stronger pairing options.
account.ledgerIntegrityLine: Data integrity: full ledger {full} rows (buy {buy} / sell {sell} / settlement {settlement}); closed view {paired} rows (= sell+settlement). BUY rows have pnl 0, so Σpnl full {sumFull} should match Σpnl closed {sumPaired}{flag}
account.ledgerSource: Per-fill from Data API; SETTLEMENT = resolved payout on remaining shares. BUY rows have no sell leg; pnl sums with lifetime.net_pnl when book is complete.
account.ledgerEmptyBody: This report has no trade ledger (usually an older cached build). Deploy analyzer schema 2.5.2+, then use Reload full report (bypass cache) above and reopen.
account.ledgerFootnote: Em dash (—): BUY rows have no sell/settlement leg, so sell price/amount and row P&L are usually — (no realized P&L on buys). SETTLEMENT rows may show $0 sell side when the market pays 0; outcome may show — because the row is synthesized without an outcome label.
